hero.title: API Integration
hero.subtitle: Seamless Shipping Automation
hero.description: Connect your systems directly to our shipping infrastructure with our powerful API. Automate shipping processes, track packages in real-time, and scale your operations effortlessly.

overview.title: Why Choose Our API Integration?
overview.description: Our developer-friendly API enables you to embed shipping functionality directly into your applications. With comprehensive documentation, robust security, and dedicated support, integration is quick and reliable.

features.title: RESTful Architecture
features.description: Modern, well-documented API with predictable resource-oriented URLs and standard HTTP responses.

features.title: Secure Authentication
features.description: OAuth 2.0 authentication and HTTPS encryption to keep your data secure at all times.

features.title: Real-Time Capabilities
features.description: Live tracking, instant rate calculations, and immediate shipping label generation.

features.title: Comprehensive Documentation
features.description: Detailed guides, code samples, and SDKs for all major programming languages.

cta.title: Ready to Integrate?
cta.description: Get API credentials and start building powerful shipping solutions into your applications.
